# `library_codex.string.RollingHash`

$2^{61}-1$ 静的hash・連結・反転・LCP。

- 計算量の目安: 構築 $O(N)$、取得 $O(1)$
- source: [`string/RollingHash.py`](../../../string/RollingHash.py)
- 公開API: function 1、class 5、method/property 33（Python protocol 11を含む）

## Import

```python
from library_codex.string.RollingHash import (
    hash_sequence,
    HashString,
    RollingHash,
    DoubleRollingHash,
    ReversibleRollingHash,
    RollingHashView,
)
```

## 公開定数

| 定数 | 値 | source |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `MOD` | `(1 << 61) - 1` | [L4](../../../string/RollingHash.py#L4) |
| `MASK` | `MOD` | [L5](../../../string/RollingHash.py#L5) |
| `DEFAULT_BASE` | `_splitmix(_seed) % (MOD - (1 << 20)) + (1 << 20)` | [L28](../../../string/RollingHash.py#L28) |
| `DEFAULT_BASE2` | `_splitmix(_seed ^ 15111065706836454659) % (MOD - (1 << 20)) + (1 << 20)` | [L29](../../../string/RollingHash.py#L29) |

| [`hash_sequence(sequence, base=DEFAULT_BASE, base2=None)`](../../../string/RollingHash.py#L47) | module の `hash_sequence function` を実行する。 | `sequence`: 入力列<br>`base`: 底・基準となる値または列。省略時: `DEFAULT_BASE`<br>`base2`: 第2のhash base。省略時: `None` | `first` / tuple(`first`, `_component_hash(sequence, base2)`) |
